---
name: workshopPlan
description: Create a presenter-friendly plan for a repo change without editing files.
agent: planner
---
Create a presenter-led plan for the requested change.

Requirements:

- do not edit files
- identify the smallest credible change slice
- identify which files matter most
- explain what should happen in VS Code first and what should move to Copilot CLI
- include how the story continues into review, security, workflow agents, and SRE

Return a concise plan that a workshop presenter can explain live.
